arts.ttl: What Happened to Footballer Deemed Too Violent to Play in Old Firm Derby For Rangers
arts.sum: Rangers' Kevin Muscat was banned from playing in Old Firm derbies by Alex McLeish. He was considered too violent for the occasion.
